uu={} uy={-16838,-40147,-9515,-36899,-8989,-20604,-27801,-45883,-8511,-60312,-25616,-30280,-34640,-14056,-29012,1290} uv=function(vi) local vj=uy[vi] local vk=(vi*2945)%4096 local vl=((vj+vk)-3354)+ux uu[vi*131071+ux]=vl return vl end uw=0 ut=uw ux=uw ux=ux*28+(30001) ut=ut+(uu[15*131071+ux] or uv(15)) while ut~=845 do if ut<782 then if ut==776 then if((vc-vd)*ve<=0) then ux=ux*18+(-612448) end end end ep=function(we,wf) local wg,wh,wi,wj,wk,wl,wm,wn,wo,wp,wq,wr,ws,wt,wu,wv,ww,wx,wy,wz,xa,xb,xc,xd,xe,xf,xg,xh,xi,xj,xk,xl,xm,xn,xo,xp,xq,xr,xs,xt,xu,xv,xw,xx wh={}
